audit_items.proof_trace: The clamp at L785 (`elapsedTime = elapsedTime > auctionDuration ? auctionDuration : elapsedTime`) bounds elapsedTime before the priceMultiplier computation. With elapsedTime ≤ auctionDuration, the mulDiv result is ≤ (start-end), so priceMultiplier ≥ endingPriceMultiplier ≥ i_minPriceMultiplier > 0 — no negative multiplier is possible. The primary bid() caller (L425) additionally rejects calls with elapsedTime > auctionDuration before reaching _getAssetOutAmount, providing redundant defense-in-depth.
